confirmedConflictResolutions.asyncUserContextPolicy: Do not rely on LoginUserContext in async threads; pass required user values explicitly.

confirmedConflictResolutions.securityConfigSource: YAML and environment variables drive security runtime configuration. sys_config entries are display/management parameters unless explicitly wired later.

createdCommonModules.description: Common core contracts: Result, error codes, exceptions, assertions, constants, and common enums.
Cross-layer shared models: page, sort, tree, label-value, id-name, and id-list contracts.
Request and thread context contracts such as login user context and trace context.
Synchronous domain event abstractions without external MQ dependencies.
Pure Java utility contracts for JSON, mask, IP, crypto, and tree helpers.
MyBatis compile-time contracts: BaseDO, enum contracts, and JSON type handler dependencies.
Shared test support based on JUnit 5 and Mockito.

createdBusinessModules.description: System management center aggregation module containing system-api and system-biz.
Clean system API contract module; no data-access, infra, web starter, or MyBatis dependency.
System management business implementation module with allowed dependencies on system-api, data-access, common, and selected infra modules.
